headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on ConocoPhillips, Raises Price Target to $153
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Devin McDermott   maintains ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $149 to $153.

headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) and Glenfarne’s Alaska LNG Sign 30-Year Natural Gas Supply Agreement
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is one of the Most Undervalued US Stocks According to Hedge Funds. On May 18, Reuters reported that ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) and Glenfarne’s Alaska LNG project have signed a 30-year natural gas supply agreement. This marks a significant milestone towards the project’s development. ​The report highlighted that, as a result of this deal, Alaska […]

headline: Why ConocoPhillips (COP) Is Still a Cash-Flow Bet Amid LNG Project Activity
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is one of the best stocks to buy according to Goldman Sachs’ Conviction List. Goldman added the stock to its U.S. Conviction List in March, with Business Insider reporting that the firm viewed ConocoPhillips as favorably positioned amid energy price volatility and expected the company’s major projects to support a period of lower […]
